dialogue: Now, today is a very special day... But first,
I wanna say how grateful I am to all of you.
You all come here everyday and work your butts off..
Putting in the work to make this company keep running!
And you do it all so kindly and orderly, without EVER causing a stir!
THAT'S why we're the best company worldwide.
Respectable people like you, for the past 50 years..
Have been working around the clock to make the world a better place!
We're proud as a company to say we've gotten this far..
As of 3 hours ago marking our 50th anniversary!
This party is a gift from Atman to celebrate our founders..
And all the people who make their extraordinary work possible!
